info.title: firecrawl
info.description: First-class CLI for the Firecrawl API

options.description: Print the SDK response as JSON instead of human-readable text.

commands.name: scrape
commands.description: Scrape a single URL and optionally extract information using an LLM.

options.name: --input
options.description: Load a JSON request from a file or '-' for stdin. Explicit flags override matching fields.

options.name: --output
options.description: Write the rendered command output to a file instead of stdout.

options.name: --format
options.description: Formats to include in the output.

options.name: --only-main-content
options.description: Only return the main page content.

options.name: --include-tag
options.description: HTML tags to include in the output.

options.name: --exclude-tag
options.description: HTML tags to exclude from the output.

options.name: --max-age
options.description: Maximum cache age in milliseconds.

options.name: --header
options.description: HTTP headers as key=value.

options.name: --wait-for
options.description: Delay in milliseconds before reading the page.

options.name: --mobile
options.description: Emulate a mobile device.

options.name: --skip-tls-verification
options.description: Skip TLS certificate verification.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Request timeout in milliseconds.

options.name: --parse-pdf
options.description: Parse PDF content into markdown instead of returning base64.

options.name: --json-prompt
options.description: Prompt to use for JSON extraction.

options.description: System prompt to use for JSON extraction.

options.name: --json-schema-json
options.description: Inline JSON Schema for JSON extraction.

options.name: --json-schema-file
options.description: Path to a JSON Schema file for JSON extraction.

options.name: --action-json
options.description: Action JSON object, repeatable and order-preserving.

options.name: --action-file
options.description: Path to a JSON action file, repeatable and order-preserving.

options.name: --location-country
options.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

options.name: --location-language
options.description: Preferred languages for the request.

options.name: --remove-base64-images
options.description: Remove base64 images from the output.

options.name: --block-ads
options.description: Enable ad and cookie popup blocking.

options.name: --proxy
options.description: Proxy type: basic, enhanced, auto.

options.name: --change-mode
options.description: Change tracking mode: git-diff, json.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start a batch scrape job.

options.name: --input
options.description: Load a JSON request from a file or '-' for stdin. Explicit flags override matching fields.

options.name: --output
options.description: Write the rendered command output to a file instead of stdout.

options.name: --wait
options.description: Poll the related status endpoint until the job reaches a terminal state.

options.name: --poll-interval
options.description: Polling interval, for example 2s, 500ms, 00:00:02. [default: 2s]

options.name: --wait-timeout
options.description: Maximum time to wait before timing out, for example 30m or 00:30:00. [default: 30m]

options.name: --ignore-invalid-urls
options.description: Ignore invalid URLs instead of failing the full request.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start a crawl job.

options.name: --input
options.description: Load a JSON request from a file or '-' for stdin. Explicit flags override matching fields.

options.name: --output
options.description: Write the rendered command output to a file instead of stdout.

options.name: --wait
options.description: Poll the related status endpoint until the job reaches a terminal state.

options.name: --poll-interval
options.description: Polling interval, for example 2s, 500ms, 00:00:02. [default: 2s]

options.name: --wait-timeout
options.description: Maximum time to wait before timing out, for example 30m or 00:30:00. [default: 30m]

options.name: --exclude-path
options.description: URL pathname regex patterns to exclude.

options.name: --include-path
options.description: URL pathname regex patterns to include.

options.name: --max-depth
options.description: Maximum crawl depth relative to the base URL.

options.name: --max-discovery-depth
options.description: Maximum crawl depth based on discovery order.

options.name: --ignore-sitemap
options.description: Ignore the website sitemap.

options.name: --ignore-query-parameters
options.description: Ignore query parameters when deduplicating URLs.

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.

options.name: --allow-backward-links
options.description: Allow sibling and parent links.

options.name: --allow-external-links
options.description: Allow links to external websites.

options.name: --delay
options.description: Delay in seconds between scrapes.
